description: Suggests where the viewer's camera (web orbit camera, AR ghost-camera, or visionOS attention reticle) should look during this beat. Not a transform on any element — a hint the renderer consumes.

lookAt.desc: Either a literal [x,y,z] target, or the id of an element whose world position should be used.

distance.desc: How far back from the lookAt to position the camera.

elevation.desc: Y offset added to the lookAt for the camera position.

notes: On the web viewer this becomes a smooth OrbitControls target/position tween.
On visionOS it should be a reticle / glow on the target rather than a forced camera move.
